name: badge
title: Badge
description: Compact labels for status and metadata.

api.description: Compact label for status and metadata. Label ink is optically centered to cap height with text-box when available, and a 1cap line box otherwise. Compose a close control, nested counter, or OptionList dropdown via children and render.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the badge.

props.name: size
props.description: T-shirt height and type size. Nested counter chips are supported on md, lg, and xl only.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius of the badge.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

props.name: count
props.description: Trailing count chip bound to any numeric value (1 to 4+ digits). Shown on md, lg, and xl hosts.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element to clone badge styles onto. For dropdowns, prefer OptionListTrigger render={<Badge />}.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Legacy alias for composing onto a child host.

props.name: children
props.description: Label and optional trailing content: close button, nested count badge, or chevron.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the badge.

props.name: …HTML attributes
props.description: Standard element attributes (id, title, aria-*, etc.).

groups.title: Composition
groups.description: Patterns built with children or render. Not separate props on Badge.

props.name: Close button
props.description: Place a button with an X icon after the label. The button inherits badge color and is keyboard focusable.

props.name: Counter
props.description: Prefer the count prop for numeric data. Or nest a second Badge. Host size must be md, lg, or xl so the chip stays readable. Width grows with 1 to 4+ digits.

props.name: Dropdown
props.description: OptionListTrigger owns open/close. Pass Badge via render so the chip is the clickable host. Pair with OptionListContent for the menu.

groups.title: Dropdown panel
groups.description: Pass these on OptionListContent when the badge opens an option list. Placement is relative to the badge trigger.

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal menu alignment. start pins left, end pins right, center centers on the badge, auto picks the best fit from available space (content-aware).

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Extra shift along the alignment axis in pixels.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side of the badge for the menu.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between the badge and the menu.

props.name: alignItemWithTrigger
props.description: When true, menu width matches the badge. When false, the menu sizes to its option content.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --primary
props.description: Default variant fill.

props.name: --secondary
props.description: Secondary variant fill.

props.name: --destructive
props.description: Destructive variant fill.

props.name: --border
props.description: Outline variant border.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Ghost variant hover fill.

props.name: --muted-foreground
props.description: Ghost variant label.

props.name: --radius-4xl
props.description: Default radius step. The radius prop can select any --radius-* step, from none to full.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.

props.name: --df-label-line-height
props.description: Line box for label flex centering. Defaults to --df-leading-none. When text-box is unavailable and the cap unit is supported, the kit sets this to 1cap so flex centering matches cap-height ink.
